title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Oberoi Realty - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Oberoi Realty - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Oberoi Realty has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oberoi Realty:
Oberoi Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Realty!
